title: bidens burundiensis
intro: Bidens burundiensis, also known as Burundi tickseed, is a species of flowering plant in the aster family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bidens burundiensis include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Bidens burundiensis can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
